query: SELECT id, amount, type, description, createdAt FROM creditTransactions WHERE userId = 1 AND type IN ('purchase', 'refund', 'admin', 'bonus') ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute SELECT id, amount, type, description, createdAt FROM creditTransactions WHERE userId = 1 AND type IN ('purchase', 'refund', 'admin', 'bonus') ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
